channel.title: Knowledge Recorder Updates
channel.description: Signed macOS updates for Knowledge Recorder.

item.description:
## macOS
- Every action in the recorder widget now has theme-aware hover, pressed, and disabled feedback. - Round controls lift subtly on hover and compress on press without shifting the widget layout. - The primary record, pause, and stop controls use the same tactile visual language.
## Windows
- The recorder widget and mini player now have smooth hover lift and pressed compression. - Dedicated pressed colors, keyboard focus rings, and subdued disabled states improve clarity. - Fixed sizing and centered glyphs remain stable in dark and light themes.
SHA256:
- `DesktopRecorder.exe`: `654a09dbe5f14ddd846bbd8fc99b62d2e2b5beac2ab4faff1d9cdab5e0de8f1f` - `DesktopRecorder-Setup.exe`: `3f78c065da502bfad29205283bff65cb10200333e80338dc2e9408ab4eb021e1` - `DesktopRecorder-macOS.dmg`: `87f9599a723db94f03e02c77eeb978bb03d3cc1e7ae3d2b23d7773667645abf9`

## macOS
- Choosing **Region**, **Window**, or **Full Screen** from the screenshot or video quick-action menu now only saves the mode. - Capture starts with the next explicit click. The named **Screen only** and **Screen + camera** video actions still start immediately.
## Windows
- The recorder widget and mini player now use the same predictable mode-selection behavior. - Choosing a screenshot or video mode saves it without starting a capture; the next regular button click executes it.
SHA256:
- `DesktopRecorder.exe`: `4e02f89d152ca6b51d1eb42203858a14b4104903aba036d7a7e516ec42ac0c73` - `DesktopRecorder-Setup.exe`: `f1db19aa1400863910f66be568747f598e41bfd5b0661ccb4a3d14c734349326` - `DesktopRecorder-macOS.dmg`: `4e278ad2588030e4393e675fd170476ad6b2508c1b7f255765a883c8700ff67f`

# Knowledge Recorder 1.1.54
## macOS
- Der höhenfüllende Diktatverlauf hält jetzt einen kompakten Abstand von 16 Pixeln zur Unterkante des Einstellungsbereichs. - Die Verlaufskarte berührt das Fenster nicht mehr und nutzt trotzdem fast die gesamte verfügbare vertikale Höhe.
